sections.paragraph: m. pr. part. Kal of the verb חָרַשׁ No. 1, 2, cutting, fabricating, hence a cutting instrument, edged tool. Gen 4:22, כָּל־חֹרֵשׁ נְחשֶׁת “all kinds of tools of brass.” [Eng. Vers. takes this word simply as a participle, and there does not appear any sufficient reason for making this occurrence of the word into a new substantive. E.V. gives decidedly the better sense.]
